title: Matrix Build
summary: Matrix Build is a first-party reference for experimental narrative sequencing, expressive interaction, and product storytelling on the web.
lessons: Use interaction to advance a product thesis instead of decorating a conventional landing page.
Sequence information as a deliberate narrative while preserving a clear path to action.
caveats: Observed interface behavior can drift quickly; re-verify before promoting implementation details.
licenseNote: Public website; cite observations and transfer principles only.
antiImitationNote: Do not copy Matrix identity, layouts, assets, or motion signatures; synthesize the narrative method into AwesomeDS's evidence-first grammar.
